scripts.dev:quick: echo 'WARNING: dev:quick skips cache clean and may cause 500 errors. Use yarn dev instead.' && next dev -p 3000
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/d3-shape/src/curve/basis.js';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('Broken install — re-run yarn install');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.verify: node scripts/dev-clean.mjs && next build && echo '\n✓ Build OK. Run yarn dev to start the dev server with fresh assets.'
